title: ruehssia trisegmentata
intro: Ruehssia trisegmentata, also known as Trisegmentata, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant contains limonene, a compound with medicinal properties that has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ruehssia trisegmentata include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight against certain types of bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
